title: lotus corniculatus subsp. major
intro: Lotus corniculatus subsp. major, also known as the greater bird's-foot trefoil, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Lotus corniculatus subsp. major can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or dried herb for use in various herbal preparations, such as tinctures and salves.
